Chronology of every recorded fact about [[House Shen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — House Shen is a rival and neighbor of House Arelius.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — House Shen is a group associated with Reigan Shen.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — House Shen is suspected of owning territory on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — House Shen is readied for war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — House Shen has a Herald defending a museum in Rosegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — House Shen provided aid to Sha Miara's people against the Dragon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — House Shen's symbol is a white lion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — House Shen is involved in a distant clash on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — House Shen has leaders who were occupied.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — House Shen is involved in a fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — House Shen has cloudships and artifacts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — House Shen is retreating from the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — House Shen had more sacred artists than the opposing force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — House Shen is a group that Yushi brought to the battle.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Shen is the family of Reigan Shen.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
